_comment: Source-of-truth market script. The dashboard (index.html) embeds an identical copy so it runs offline by double-click. Edit BOTH if you change values. Anchors length = rounds+1 = 14 (R1 open ... R13 close). Closing anchors are the official trade prices (all multiples of $10 — the stocks-only 'Rule of Tens'; the rest of the game economy stays on $50/$100). Intra-round ticks are visual jitter only; the round always closes exactly on its anchor. divPerShare = fixed dollar dividend paid per share each payday ($5 for the 4 stable stocks, 0 otherwise); the dashboard shows the live yield (divPerShare / price), which floats as price moves. Keep divPerShare in sync with the sheet's Market Prices 'Div/share' column. desc/tags feed the Stock Info modal only. NEWS ENGINE: one object per round (1-based). 'upcoming' shows in the Trading Window BEFORE that round (one stock hinted to rise, one to fall); 'events' fire DURING that round at the given tick (riser early, faller later) — up[]/down[] are the cards that blink green/maroon, flash pulses the news border red. Design: A&L 500 climbs monotonically ~100->230; Mooncoin pumps to ~290 then crashes to ~20; every round has one clear riser and one clear faller matched to its news.

instruments.name: A&L 500
instruments.desc: A basket of the 500 biggest US companies — buying it means you own 'the whole market' in one click.

instruments.name: 99 Megamart
instruments.desc: An everyday retail chain. People shop in good times and bad, so it stays steady and pays a dividend.

instruments.name: TenGrid
instruments.desc: The national power utility — boring but essential. It pays you a dividend just for holding it.

instruments.name: Safebank
instruments.desc: A big bank. It earns more when interest rates rise and people borrow more — and pays a dividend.

instruments.name: Telecom
instruments.desc: A telco living off monthly phone and data subscriptions — steady cashflow and a dividend.

instruments.name: Nivatech
instruments.desc: A chipmaker riding the AI boom. Huge upside when hype is on, but the swings are violent.

instruments.name: BioTech
instruments.desc: A biotech. It jumps on trial wins and FDA approvals, and drops just as fast when news disappoints.

instruments.name: DriveX
instruments.desc: An electric-vehicle maker driven by hype. Sharp run-ups on new models, sharp falls when demand cools.

instruments.name: Mooncoin
instruments.desc: A meme cryptocurrency that runs on pure Fear Of Missing Out (FOMO). It can pump to the moon — then crash to almost nothing.

up.text: Nivatech is about to release a powerful new computer chip.

down.text: The pandemic is ending, so fewer people need BioTech's vaccine.

events.text: Nivatech unveils a new AI chip — tech investors start piling in.
The pandemic fades — BioTech's vaccine demand cools.

up.text: Nivatech will soon report how much money it made — many expect a lot.

down.text: People are losing interest in slow, boring companies like TenGrid.

events.text: Nivatech posts record earnings — the AI rally goes into overdrive.
Money flees utilities for tech — TenGrid drifts lower.

up.text: Everyone online is talking about Mooncoin right now.

down.text: People are selling shops like 99 Megamart to put money into crypto instead.

events.text: Mooncoin mania: up 5x as FOMO grips the crowd.
Boring is out — 99 Megamart is sold off to fund crypto bets.

up.text: DriveX is about to reveal a brand-new car model.

down.text: Everyone is chasing exciting stocks, so quiet ones like BioTech are being ignored.

events.text: DriveX unveils its next-gen EV — the stock goes vertical.
Risk-on mania: investors abandon BioTech for hotter bets.

up.text: Mooncoin is close to its highest price ever, and buyers keep coming.

down.text: The government is investigating banks that work with crypto, like Safebank.

events.text: Euphoria peaks — Mooncoin blows off to a brand-new all-time high.
First cracks: a regulatory probe rattles Safebank.

up.text: People are getting scared and looking for safe places to put money, like TenGrid.

down.text: Experts are warning that Mooncoin's price has gone up too far, too fast.

events.text: Flight to safety — money rushes into TenGrid and the A&L 500.
CRASH — the crypto bubble bursts; Mooncoin collapses overnight.

up.text: During the panic, people prefer safe companies that pay them regularly, like Telecom.

down.text: The market is still shaky, and tech companies like Nivatech are back in the news.

events.text: Investors seek shelter — steady Telecom holds up while others fall.
Contagion hits tech — Nivatech tumbles in the second leg down.

up.text: Telecom is cheap now but still pays $5 to everyone who holds it.

down.text: Fewer people are buying electric cars from DriveX.

events.text: Dividends shine: bargain hunters scoop up Telecom for its steady payout.
Capitulation: EV demand collapses and DriveX slumps to new lows.

up.text: Now that prices are low, people are starting to buy cheap tech like Nivatech again.

down.text: People feel brave again and are moving money out of safe companies like Telecom.

events.text: Recovery begins — dip-buyers pile into Nivatech and the rebound is on.
Risk-on again: defensive Telecom is sold to chase the rally.

up.text: Electricity and fuel prices are going up fast. TenGrid sells electricity.

down.text: Everything is getting more expensive to run, including shops like 99 Megamart.

events.text: Energy crunch: power prices spike and TenGrid rallies hard.
Cost inflation bites — 99 Megamart and DriveX slip on higher input costs.

up.text: BioTech is waiting to hear if the government approves its new medicine.

down.text: Hardly anyone is buying Mooncoin anymore.

events.text: Breakthrough: BioTech wins FDA approval and the stock jumps.
No bounce for crypto — Mooncoin grinds lower, near worthless.

up.text: A new wave of AI excitement is building around Nivatech.

down.text: Interest rates are expected to be cut soon. Banks like Safebank earn money from interest.

events.text: AI boom, round two — Nivatech breaks out to fresh highs.
Rate cuts loom — thinner margins drag Safebank down.

up.text: The whole market has been climbing steadily, and the A&L 500 owns a bit of everything.

down.text: People have basically forgotten about Mooncoin.

events.text: The boring A&L 500 leads a broad melt-up to record highs.
Final tally: the index more than doubled while Mooncoin went to near zero.
